judge_reason: Description B describes a single newspaper clipping containing three photographs with specific captions and a byline, whereas Description A describes four separate photographs with different subjects and captions, representing a fundamental disagreement on the number, layout, and visual content of the images.

black-and-white photograph of a mannequin wearing a garment, with a woman adjusting it and two men standing nearby.

gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A full-page magazine layout with four black-and-white photographs and article text titled “costumes executed by BROOKS”; top left shows one woman from behind in a fitted costume, bottom left shows three men in an office, bottom center shows several people fitting a costume on a woman, and bottom right shows a woman speaking with a man in a suit.*
